unresolved_questions: Whether the `wfim` published-incident family is directly reachable from another network vantage point or through a browser-only resolution path.
Whether dashboard-specific counts or list payloads are delivered entirely through `publishedIncident` or through additional hidden NRS endpoints.
Whether a concrete evacuation overlay service exists in the BCWS shell or in an adjacent ArcGIS item not surfaced by the current bundle strings.
Whether `FIRE_STATUS` in the public perimeter layer is sufficient for public stage-of-control counts without the unpublished incident payload.
notes: This matrix is limited to the BCWS dashboard/map/list cluster. It separates verified public ArcGIS services from unresolved NRS families and keeps all widget recommendations at candidate-only status.
